serverInfo.name: XON_MCP
serverInfo.title: XposedOrNot Breach Intelligence
serverInfo.description: Real-time data-breach lookup and analytics for emails and domains.

tools.name: check_email_breaches
tools.description: Check if an email address appears in any known data breaches.

tools.name: get_breach_analytics
tools.description: Detailed breach analytics for an email: risk score, timeline, exposure categories.

tools.name: list_breaches
tools.description: List or filter known breaches by domain or breach ID.

tools.name: domain_breach_summary
tools.description: Aggregate breach summary for a domain: number of breaches, affected email accounts, pastes, and most recent breach date. Returns only counts, not individual email addresses.

tools.name: get_breach_metrics
tools.description: System-wide breach statistics: total breaches and records indexed, breaches per year and industry, largest and most recent breaches, and when the latest breach was added.

tools.name: get_recent_breaches
tools.description: Latest data breach news and recently added breaches tracked by XposedOrNot.
